extra.reason: Scaffold complete: added Go module, cmd/memento entrypoint, internal CLI dispatcher with help/version smoke behavior, Justfile test/build targets, and prefetched goldmark/yaml dependencies. Verified: just test; just build; /tmp/memento-build/memento help; /tmp/memento-build/memento version.

Implemented internal/vault marker discovery. Added Discover(repoRoot) for exactly-one .memento scans, Open(dir) for explicit vaults, manifest path resolution under .memento/manifest.json, and typed errors for missing or multiple markers. Tests cover single marker success, renamed vault directories, zero markers, multiple markers, and explicit-dir behavior. Verified with go test ./... and just check.

Implemented internal .mementoignore parser records for v0 comments/blanks, escaped leading hashes, root-relative patterns, file and directory patterns, segment globs, recursive ** segments, and unsupported ! negation errors. Verified with go test ./internal/ignore and just check.

Implemented parsed .mementoignore matching for vault-relative paths, including root-relative and anywhere file/directory rules, recursive directory matching, segment globs, recursive ** segments, and deterministic path normalization/rejection for absolute or escaping paths. Verified with go test ./internal/ignore and just check.

Added vault WalkMarkdown content walker that loads .mementoignore, prunes ignored directories, skips ignored files, excludes .memento/ and .mementoignore from content, and calls the extraction callback only for non-ignored .md files. Verified with go test ./internal/vault and just check.

Added internal markdown metadata extraction with goldmark-backed title/summary fallbacks, frontmatter tags/mode/updated parsing, body hash and summary staleness detection, plus malformed frontmatter errors. Verified with just check.

Added H2/H3 heading extraction to markdown metadata with level/text/slug fields, GitHub-style slug normalization, duplicate suffix handling including generated-slug collisions, and source-order preservation tests. Verified with go test ./internal/markdown and just check.
Added explicit summary hash coverage for no-frontmatter documents and body-change staleness detection. Verified with go test ./internal/markdown and just check.

Implemented deterministic manifest compilation and compile CLI. Added manifest JSON structs/marshalling, stable entry/tag ordering, idempotent manifest writes, compile --print/--dir behavior, and operational writing_guide.md exclusion from content walks. Verified with just check.

Implemented whole-file read by vault-relative key via new internal/note reader and CLI dispatch. Read honors the manifest content boundary through WalkMarkdown, returns nested markdown content, reports missing/ignored keys clearly, and rejects traversal/absolute/backslash keys. Verified with just check.

Implemented section reads for read <key>#<section>: split read targets, extract H2/H3 sections with manifest-compatible GitHub-style slugs and duplicate suffixes, preserve nested section boundaries, handle frontmatter offsets, and report unknown sections distinctly. Added note and CLI tests for exact heading text, normalized slug addressing, duplicate suffixes, frontmatter, nested sections, and clear failures. Verified with just check.

Implemented init filesystem scaffold/adoption: memento init now creates or adopts a vault, derives the default <project>-memory name from git remote or repo dir, creates .memento/config.toml, .memento/manifest.json, and .mementoignore only when absent, and preserves existing artifacts on rerun. Added CLI and setup tests for empty creation, non-empty adoption, no-clobber idempotence, and git-remote default naming. Verified with just check.

Implemented init bootloader injection for AGENTS.md/configured instruction files with sentinel append/replace behavior, resolved memory/manifest path interpolation, and idempotent reruns. Added setup tests for absent file, existing file append, existing block replacement, custom memory paths, configured instruction file, and idempotence. Verified with go test ./... and just check.

Implemented init pre-commit hook installation: absent hooks are created with #!/bin/sh and set -eu, existing hooks keep unrelated content, and existing memento blocks are replaced idempotently. Added setup tests for create/append/replace/idempotency. Verified with go test ./internal/setup and just check.

Implemented v0 write support: write now creates new markdown files and appends to existing notes from stdin, with invalid path, ignored/operational path, symlink traversal, and deferred overwrite/section/upsert mutation coverage. Verified with go test ./internal/note ./internal/cli ./internal/vault and just check.

Implemented compile-time wikilink graph extraction: added body wikilink scanner, structured outlinks with type/resolved state, target resolution to manifest keys, inlink inversion, deterministic dedupe/sorting, and spec note for the link schema. Verified with scanner and manifest unit coverage plus just check.

Implemented write-mode validation for append: existing read-only notes now return ErrReadOnly before mutation, malformed frontmatter blocks append, and non-read-only/missing modes still append. Verified with go test ./internal/note and just check.

Implemented robust compile frontmatter adoption behavior: horizontal-rule sandwich notes now index as bare markdown, compile uses lenient metadata extraction with fallback title/summary for malformed fenced frontmatter, and CLI compile emits warnings instead of hard-failing. Verified with go test ./internal/markdown ./internal/manifest ./internal/cli and just check.

Implemented GitHub-style heading slug separator collapse. Changed headingSlug to collapse whitespace and hyphen separator runs, preserving duplicate -N disambiguation for normalized collisions. Added metadata coverage for double spaces, spaced hyphens, and mixed separator/punctuation runs; updated read-by-slug expectation to the collapsed anchor. Verified with go test ./internal/markdown, go test ./internal/note, and just check.

Implemented CLAUDE.md bootloader injection parity for init: default init now injects/replaces the sentinel block in every present AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md file, creates AGENTS.md only when neither exists, and preserves explicit AgentInstructionsPath behavior. Added setup tests for CLAUDE-only, both-files, replacement across both files, and rerun idempotence. Verified with go test ./internal/setup and just check.

Changed: init now writes an idempotent repo .gitignore Obsidian UI-noise stanza, removes Obsidian UI patterns from the default .mementoignore, and scaffolds example.md with model frontmatter only for greenfield vaults. Tests cover greenfield, adopt-existing-example, adopt-no-example, .gitignore idempotence, and CLI init expectations. Verified: go test ./internal/setup ./internal/cli; just check.

Implemented internal/brief renderer for deterministic agent-facing markdown with read-only frontmatter, generated banner, inline entry metadata, heading text, tag footer, and _memento tool-file footer. Updated compile to write .memento/manifest.json plus _memento/brief.md, warning without failing if brief write fails. Disabled HTML escaping in manifest JSON and skipped generated brief during vault walks. Verified with just check.

Implemented memento brief CLI verb. It reads existing _memento/brief.md, falls back to rendering from .memento/manifest.json and writing the derived brief, and reports a compile hint when both artifacts are missing. Added help text and CLI acceptance tests for all three states. Verified with go test ./internal/cli, just check, and go run ./cmd/memento brief.

Added manifest entry bytes and lines fields populated during compile from raw source size and newline count. Added coverage for empty files, no trailing newline, trailing LF, and CRLF; updated deterministic JSON fixtures and regenerated memento-memory/.memento/manifest.json. Verified with: just check.

Changed init bootloader generation to route agents through memento brief, kept the beads/memento substrate-boundary guidance, and removed writing_guide.md/writing.md guidance from generated blocks. Updated AGENTS.md dogfooding block and setup tests for AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md creation, append, replacement, idempotency, and absence of writing-guide references. Verified with: just check.

Changed: init now scaffolds <vault>/_memento/README.md before manifest creation, including read-only frontmatter, a memento-authored banner, and a sentinel-managed namespace convention block; existing README content is preserved while absent or stale managed blocks are appended/replaced. Tests cover greenfield, adopt-existing-no-README, adopt-existing-with-README, sentinel replacement, rerun idempotence, and manifest inclusion. Verified: go test ./internal/setup; go test ./internal/cli; just check.

Implemented init scaffolding for file-specific _memento/brief.md ignores: repo .gitignore sentinel blocks now include the generated brief path, .mementoignore defaults and adopted existing files add _memento/brief.md without ignoring the folder, and this repo's current ignore files were updated to match. Verified with just check.

Refreshed spec.md against accepted ADRs 0001/0002/0008/0009: bumped version to 0.2, updated vault naming/discovery, manifest+brief wording, _memento namespace, bootloader sample, v0-v4 scope table, and deferred list. Regenerated memento manifest so spec summary leads with post-ADR alignment. Verified with go run ./cmd/memento compile, go run ./cmd/memento brief, git diff --check, and just check.

Implemented a real memento serve dispatch stub that exits 1 with a not-implemented v3/spec §13 message instead of falling through as an unknown command. Added CLI regression coverage for serve ensuring no stdout, no unknown-command text, and the expected not-implemented context. Verified with go test ./internal/cli -count=1 and just check.

Replaced placeholder README with a concise project overview, WIP/pre-1.0 status, current CLI verbs including brief and serve stub, in-repo invocation examples, vault layout pointer, and links to spec/ADRs/AGENTS.md. Verified with just check.

Replaced the init-scaffolded _memento/README.md managed block with a write-once _memento/Using Memento.md guide. Added the guide to default/adopted .mementoignore handling so compile excludes it, refreshed tests for greenfield/adopt/no-op/re-init behavior, documented the design in ADR-0012, and refreshed the manifest. Verified with go test ./internal/setup and just check.

Implemented brief per-entry size markers from manifest Bytes/Lines with friendly byte formatting. Updated brief golden coverage for 342B, 1.2k, 12k, and zero-byte entries plus formatter coverage for 1.4M. Verified with go test ./internal/brief and just check.

Updated spec §10 to include memento brief; aligned serve help text with the v3 stub wording; added a focused help-text assertion. Verified with go test ./internal/cli -run TestHelpCommand -count=1 and just check.

Changed brief banner from hidden HTML comment to visible Obsidian caution callout; updated brief and CLI tests to expect the callout and reject the old HTML banner; amended ADR-0008 and regenerated the manifest. Verified with go test ./internal/brief ./internal/cli and just check.

Implemented brief rendering per ADR-0011: manifest hash header on line 1, folder-grouped H2 sections with root group, continuous render-time numeric entry prefixes, and shared deterministic NumberedEntries ordering. Updated brief and CLI tests for the new projection. Verified with go test ./... and just check.

Implemented numeric read references for all-digit arguments. read N now resolves against .memento/manifest.json using brief.NumberedEntries, reads the resolved entry directly without compiling, reports the ADR-0011 stale-manifest message when the manifest entry file is missing, warns on brief/manifest hash drift, and skips the hash check when _memento/brief.md is absent. Updated CLI usage text and added CLI coverage for happy path, stale file, hash drift, missing brief, and non-numeric path behavior. Verified with just check.

Implemented brief-only wikilink index suffix rendering. Resolved summary wikilinks now render with @ N using the manifest wikilink resolver and brief numbering; display links use [[target|display @ N]], while broken and anchored links remain unchanged. Added renderer and CLI coverage, including source-file non-mutation during compile. Verified with go test ./internal/brief ./internal/manifest ./internal/cli and just check.

Implemented explicit append-only default via markdown.DefaultWriteMode and used it when frontmatter omits mode. Added regression coverage for absent-mode metadata resolution, write overwrite rejection matching explicit append-only, and brief output showing mode: append-only for compiled bare markdown. Verified with just test and just check.

Implemented memento orient with embedded baseline plus manifest-selected orient:true overlays sorted by key. Added orient frontmatter parsing and manifest emission, CLI/help/spec entries, and regenerated the tracked manifest. Verified with just check and a real go run ./cmd/memento orient --dir memento-memory invocation.

Changed init bootloader block to the ADR-0013 pointer form referencing orient, brief, and read @N/key usage. Updated setup coverage for fresh init, replacement, custom paths, and configured instruction files. Added CLI regression coverage that compile, brief, orient, and read leave AGENTS.md unchanged after init. Verified with go test ./internal/setup ./internal/cli and just check.

Changed readNumberedEntry to read resolved numeric manifest keys through note.Read, preserving the stale-manifest hard error for note.ErrNotFound and deleting manifestEntryPath. Verified with go test ./internal/cli and just check.

Added ADR-0016 as an accepted read-only ADR recording the @N CLI convention, brief wikilink display suffix convention, and brief manifest-hash frontmatter placement, with a scalar supersedes link back to ADR-0011 listing the affected paragraphs. Added a frontmatter forward pointer from ADR-0011 to ADR-0016 without changing ADR-0011 body content. Regenerated memento manifest/brief successfully. Verified with: go run ./cmd/memento compile; go run ./cmd/memento brief >/tmp/memento-brief-check.md; just check.

Moved brief manifest hash into frontmatter and updated drift parsing to read manifest: from the opening frontmatter block, independent of field order. Updated renderer/CLI tests for the new brief shape and parser edge cases. Verified with go test ./internal/brief ./internal/cli and just check.

Implemented brief wikilink suffix rendering per ADR-0016: bare resolved wikilinks now render as [[target|target @N]], display-text links render as [[target|display @N]], and anchored/unresolved links remain unchanged. Updated focused brief and compile tests. Verified with go test ./internal/brief, go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestCompileBriefSuffixesWikiLinksWithoutMutatingSources|TestCompileArtifactsDoNotLeakHTMLEscapedSequences', and just check.

Changed memento read numeric references to require @N, with bare numeric-looking paths routed through normal key reads. Updated CLI help, tests for @N/stale/hash cases, invalid @ errors, literal 5.md path behavior, and spec §10. Verified with go test ./internal/cli, just check, and just run compile.

Added stable CLI error token formatting and exported manifest/CLI sentinels; documented the token contract in spec §10 and regenerated the manifest. Verified with go test ./internal/cli and just check.

Added manifest schema_version v1 emission and shared schema-aware manifest loading with manifest-schema-unsupported CLI token. Added v1 fixture round-trip, schema rejection, CLI token, and brief render contract order tests. Documented schema_version, brief render contract, and new error token in spec; regenerated memento-memory manifest. Verified with just check.

Changed: added .github/workflows/ci.yml with a ubuntu-latest + macos-latest matrix that installs Go from go.mod, installs just via apt/brew, and runs just check on push to main and pull_request; added the README CI badge.
Verified: just check passes locally; workflow YAML parses; a temporary deliberately failing Go test made just check exit nonzero, then was removed and just check passed again.
Note: attempted the requested linux container check, but Docker is unavailable in this sandbox (cannot connect to /var/run/docker.sock). The pushed workflow will provide the Linux/macOS runner signal.

Implemented compile performance coverage for the synthetic 500-document vault.

Changed:
- Added BenchmarkCompile500Docs and TestCompileWithin1s in internal/cli, using deterministic mixed frontmatter/bare markdown, 3-5 headings per doc, nested folders, and seeded wikilinks.
- Added just bench for go test -bench=. -benchmem ./internal/cli/.
- Documented the current benchmark baseline in README Performance: 18,019,817 ns/op on Apple M2 Max macOS arm64.

Verified:
- go test ./internal/cli -run ^TestCompileWithin1s$ -count=1 -v (23.847584ms observed)
- just bench (18,019,817 ns/op, 22.2 MB/op, 108,096 allocs/op)
- just check

v0 scope per spec §13 delivered. CLI verbs (compile/init/read/write/brief/orient + serve stub), .mementoignore subdir walk with glob+comment syntax, tag vocabulary, heading tree + GH-style slugs, out/in link graph as data, bare-markdown fallback, hash-based staleness detection, adopt-or-create init, pre-commit hook, sentinel bootloader injection (AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md), .gitignore stanza, _memento/ namespace + Using Memento guide, brief render with manifest-hash frontmatter and @N numbering, README. 45/45 child beads complete. v1 hardening continues under memento-fb0.

Removed the memento serve stub from CLI dispatch/help, removed the serve-specific test and obsolete not-implemented sentinel, and updated README/spec/memory prose for ADR-0019's CLI-only roadmap. Re-homed read link surfaces to v2 and agent-driven summarisation to v4 in spec §13, refreshed the memento manifest with compile, and retitled/reframed parent epic memento-fb0. Verified with go test ./internal/cli and just check.

Updated README CLI verb list to match memento help, including orient, --dir/--print usage, @N reads, and a short pointer to the spec error-token contract. Added a CLI regression test that compares README Current verbs against the help Usage/Commands output. Verified with go test ./internal/cli and just check.

Changed: added focused vault-walk portability tests for NFC/NFD Unicode path spellings, case-only filename twins where the filesystem supports them, and symlinked files/directories; updated WalkMarkdown to skip all symlink entries; documented the v1 path-spelling and symlink policy in ADR-0020; regenerated the memento manifest. Verified: go test ./internal/vault; go test ./internal/manifest ./internal/note; just check.
Added CLI-level property tests for compile, brief, and init idempotency with deterministic generated vault/repo cases and shrink-on-failure reporting. Verified with just check.

Updated spec §15 with v1-close open-question triage: resolved shipped v1 items against ADRs, named v2 blockers, and parked deferred/post-v4 items from the open-thread notes. Regenerated memento-memory manifest. Verified with: go run ./cmd/memento compile --dir memento-memory; just check.

Completed the v1 agent-stability gate with three consecutive end-to-end validation runs.

Changed:
- Added commit-visible log exceptions for logs/memento-fb0.9-*.log while keeping normal Ralph logs ignored.
- Added run logs:
  - logs/memento-fb0.9-run-1.log
  - logs/memento-fb0.9-run-2.log
  - logs/memento-fb0.9-run-3.log

Each run built the CLI, compiled the project vault, read the brief, selected relevant durable docs via tag and heading scans, read the selected doc, performed a representative memento write in an isolated vault, compiled that vault, read the written note back, and exited with RESULT: PASS.

Verified:
- just check

Removed compile --print and non-init --dir flags; refactored CLI tests/benchmark/property tests to rely on cwd marker discovery; updated README/spec and regenerated manifest. Verified: go test ./internal/cli; go run ./cmd/memento compile; just check; git diff --check. Direct removed-flag smokes returned invalid-arguments. Direct init --dir smoke against the real repo was blocked by sandboxed .git/hooks writes, but init --dir remains covered by passing tests.

Implemented ADR-0017 v1 read-only edit-window slice: unratified read-only notes append successfully, ratified/non-git read-only notes still reject, and memento read emits binding: ratified|unratified on stderr before stdout content. Updated orient/bootloader text plus spec/ADR cross-references and recompiled the memento manifest. Verified with go test ./internal/note, go test ./internal/cli, just test, just check, git diff --check, and a CLI read smoke test.

Implemented explicit memento write --overwrite support. Added operation-aware mode enforcement for append/overwrite across ratified and unratified append-only/living/read-only notes, including summary_hash staleness coverage. Updated CLI help, README, orient baseline, spec, ADR-0017, and regenerated the memento manifest. Verified with go test ./internal/note ./internal/cli and just check.

Changed: added `description:` as summary fallback after `summary:` and before first paragraph; added explicit parsed-and-ignored OKF convention cases for `type`, `resource`, `timestamp`, and `okf_version`; updated ADR-0014, spec §9, and regenerated manifest metadata.
Verified: `go test ./internal/markdown`, `go test ./internal/manifest`, `just check`, and `go run ./cmd/memento compile`.

Implemented vault-rename-safe gitignore sentinel block: init now writes recursive **/.obsidian/workspace*, **/.obsidian/cache, and **/_memento/brief.md entries and removed the obsolete gitignoreVaultPrefix helper. Updated setup assertions and added a spec addendum documenting the recursive contract; refreshed the memento manifest. Verified with go test ./internal/setup, targeted init/idempotency tests, just run compile, and just check.

Changed: removed the unused manifest_path default from init-created config.toml, added a setup test asserting header-only config contents, updated spec.md to describe config.toml as a header-only extension point, and recompiled the memento manifest.
Verified: go test ./internal/setup; just check.

Documented vault rename policy in spec.md: bare memento init rediscovers the moved marker, refreshes the AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md bootloader and pre-commit hook, and replaces older path-pinned gitignore blocks while the current recursive gitignore block survives renames. Verified with go run ./cmd/memento compile and just check.

Changed ratification git checks to use global --literal-pathspecs for worktree detection and ls-files, so vault keys with pathspec metacharacters are checked literally. Added regression coverage for a tracked bracket filename returning ratified and an untracked wildcard filename not being ratified by a different tracked match. Verified with: go test ./internal/note -run 'TestBindingForKey(TreatsTrackedPathspecMetacharactersLiterally|DoesNotRatifyUntrackedPathspecMetacharacterMatch)' -count=1; just check.

Removed the unreachable exec.ErrNotFound ratification fallback so unexpected git ls-files exec failures now return contextual errors instead of ratifying. Added a regression test for git disappearing after the work-tree probe. Verified with go test ./internal/note and just check.

Changed ratification git probing to capture stderr and surface fatal/broken repository failures instead of treating them as non-git or untracked. Preserved the conservative non-git fallback for old Git's 'not a git repository' output when no .git marker exists in the vault ancestry, and added focused shim tests for old non-repo, broken repo rev-parse, fatal rev-parse, and fatal ls-files behavior. Verified with go test ./internal/note -run 'TestBindingForKey', go test ./internal/note, git diff --check, and just check.

Changed validateWriteMode to check ratification before reading/parsing metadata, so unratified writes return early. Added regression coverage for unratified malformed frontmatter to prove metadata parsing is skipped. Verified with go test ./internal/note and just check.

Inlined BindingForKey into BindingForReadTarget and removed the redundant normalizeKey call from isRatified. Updated ratification tests to exercise BindingForReadTarget directly. Verified with go test ./internal/note and just check.

Removed the derivable checkBriefHash local from runRead and now gates warnIfBriefHashDrift directly on strings.HasPrefix(target, "@"). Verified with just fmt and just check (gofmt, go test ./..., go vet ./..., go build).
Changed CLI test cwd helpers to report restore failures via testing.TB Fatalf instead of ignoring os.Chdir errors. Verified with go test ./internal/cli and just check.
Closed

Implemented ADR-0022 auto-compile after successful memento write. Write now regenerates manifest and brief via the compile artifact path, emits compiled entry count on stderr, skips compile on rejected writes, and returns non-zero with a warning if post-write compile fails while leaving the body on disk. Updated write CLI/orient/README descriptions and added CLI tests for success, failed-write skip, compile-failure asymmetry, and sequential writes. Verified with go test ./internal/note ./internal/cli and just check.

Implemented ADR-0010 writing guide surfacing. Orient now conditionally shows the memento write precondition when _memento/writing.md exists; greenfield init scaffolds a minimal read-only writing guide while adoption never creates or clobbers it; write remains silent. Added dogfooded memento-memory/_memento/writing.md and recompiled the manifest after running memento init against the non-empty repo vault. Verified with focused orient/init/write tests and just check.

Implemented Path B. Anchored wikilinks now parse into a separate anchor field, manifest outlinks and inverted inlinks serialize anchor when present while keeping schema_version 1, and duplicate suppression preserves distinct anchors. Added anchored-link manifest fixture coverage plus extractor coverage. Verified: go test ./internal/markdown ./internal/manifest; go test ./internal/cli -run TestCompileIdempotencyProperty; just check.

Implemented whole-file read stderr link surface from the manifest. Added CLI coverage for stdout byte preservation, fixed role ordering, empty-role omission, resolved @N rendering, unresolved raw targets, @N reads, empty-link docs, and wiki/embed separation. Updated orient/bootloader/README wording. Verified with go test ./internal/setup ./internal/orient ./internal/cli and just check.

Implemented section-scoped read link surfaces. Section reads now re-extract outgoing wikilinks/embeds from the section excerpt, filter incoming wiki/embed links by manifest anchor against the resolved section slug, and keep whole-file read behavior unchanged. Runtime path in effect: anchor-filtered section inlinks; file-scoped fallback remains covered by an explicit helper test. Verified with targeted go test ./internal/cli -run 'TestRead(Section|WholeFile|EmptySection)' and just check.

Changed runCompile to emit compiled: <N> entries on stderr after successful artifact writes, using the same count/format as write. Updated compile, write parity, idempotency, and compile performance tests for the new stderr contract. Verified with go test ./internal/cli and just check.

Replaced orient triggered-preconditions literal placeholder with a stable embedded marker. baselineForVault now renders the marker as either the writing-guide precondition or 'None yet.' and errors if the marker is missing/duplicated. Added an orient unit test asserting the baseline marker exists and updated CLI orient expectations for rendered baseline output. Verified with go test ./internal/orient ./internal/cli and just check.

Restored wikilink extraction to skip bare same-doc anchors () so they do not become unresolved outlinks. Added parser and CLI regression coverage, updated manifest fixture expectations, amended ADR-0021 with the decision, and refreshed the memento manifest. Verified with ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/markdown	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/manifest	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/cli	(cached), , and ?   	github.com/tpisel/memento/cmd/memento	[no test files]
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/brief	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/cli	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/ignore	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/manifest	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/markdown	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/note	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/orient	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/setup	(cached)
ok  	github.com/tpisel/memento/internal/vault	(cached).

Replaced hardcoded wiki/embed link-type comparisons in internal/cli/cli.go with markdown.WikiLinkTypeWiki and markdown.WikiLinkTypeEmbed constants; helper parameters now use markdown.WikiLinkType directly. Verified with just check.
